---
name: create-instructions
description: This prompt is used to generate instructions files for the /docs directory.
agent: Instructions Generator
---

Take the information below and generate an agent instructions .md file for it in the /docs directory. If a .md filename is provided, use that, otherwise generate an appropiate filename based on the generated content. Make sure the instructions are concise and not too long. Make sure ti update the AGENTS.md file to reference this new docs file. If no information is provided below, promt the user to give the necessary details about the layer of architecture or coding standards to document.
